policy.description: Budget comprehensive cover with standard age-based depreciation and no nil-depreciation add-on (glass is still always nil depreciation; rubber/plastic/tyre always 50% deduction). Tyre cover explicitly conditional on concurrent body damage.

policy.product: Motor Private Car Comprehensive (Own Damage + Third Party Liability)
policy.description: Comprehensive cover with all damage types indemnified under one accidental-external-means clause. Standard age-based depreciation (Nil to 50%); glass at nil depreciation; fibre-glass parts at 30%. No add-on covers.

policy.description: Budget comprehensive cover with standard age-based depreciation and no nil-depreciation add-on (glass is still always nil depreciation; rubber/plastic/tyre always 50% deduction). Tyre cover explicitly conditional on concurrent body damage.

coverage.text: [Your vehicle is covered for loss or damage caused by:] (cid:127) Tyre and tube damage at 50% of replacement cost, only when the vehicle has also been damaged in the same incident. (cid:127) Damage in transit by road, rail, or water. (cid:127) Landslide or rockslide damage.
